## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Origami;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Origami { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
paper, bird

## Categories
animals, design

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/origami)
